---
title: "1. Foundations of Reproducible Analytics"
---

## HEADING

::: callout-tip
TIPS!
:::

::: callout-note
TIPS!
:::

::: callout-important
TIPS!
:::

::: callout-warning
TIPS!
:::

::: callout-caution
TIPS!
:::

::: callout-danger
TIPS!
:::

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| cache: True
#| out.width: "100%"
# knitr::include_graphics('image/IMAGE.jpg')
```
